info.description: We adjust the weighting based on what each standard emphasizes, making the comparison more realistic.

aiSetup.title: AI agent configuration
aiSetup.subtitle: Define how AI should support your compliance

banner.title: Safe use of AI in accordance with regulations
banner.description: Mynder follows ISO/IEC 42001:2023 (AI Management System) and ISO 42005 (Impact Assessment) to ensure responsible use of AI. All autonomy levels are automatically documented.

aiSetup.criticalProcessWarning: Critical processes are limited to maximum Limited autonomous level to ensure sufficient human control.
aiSetup.savedDesc: Your autonomy settings are updated and documented in accordance with ISO/IEC 42001.

transparency.title: Report on the Transparency Act in 25 minutes 🛡️
transparency.subtitle: Lara helps you with due diligence assessments, supplier mapping and human rights analysis – tailored to your industry and supply chain.

autopilot.title: Let Lara do the job ⚡️
autopilot.subtitle: Autopilot mode. Lara maps suppliers, assesses risk and creates reports automatically.

manual.title: Customize yourself 🧭
manual.subtitle: Manual configuration. You control every part of the due diligence assessment.

sustainability.title: Map your sustainability in 3 minutes 🌍
sustainability.subtitle: Lara, your AI partner, helps you retrieve data, create policies and set goals – tailored to your industry and competence level.

autopilot.title: Let Lara do the job ⚡️
autopilot.subtitle: Autopilot mode. Lara does all the work for you and just asks you to approve along the way.

manual.title: Customize yourself 🧭
manual.subtitle: Manual configuration. You have full control over every part of the process.
